ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mental_health_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry (monthly basis) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data is collected */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population (e.g., 0-14, 15-24, etc.) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population (e.g., Male, Female, Non-binary) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population (e.g., White, African American, Asian, etc.) */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status (e.g., Low, Middle, High) */,
  "mental_health_issues" TEXT /* Types of mental health issues reported (e.g., Depression, Anxiety, etc.) */,
  "solitariness" INTEGER /* Number of individuals reporting feelings of solitariness */,
  "suicide_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of reported suicide attempts */,
  "suicide_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of reported suicide deaths */,
  "is_partial" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the data is partial (True/False) */,
  "time_f" INTEGER /* Time factor (a normalized time variable, e.g., 0 for baseline, 1 for subsequent months) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., National Health Survey, Hospital Records) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mental_health_statistics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., City, County) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated (e.g., State, Province) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the location */,
  "urbanization" TEXT /* Level of urbanization (e.g., Urban, Suburban, Rural) */,
  "healthcare_access" TEXT /* Level of access to healthcare (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the location */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the demographic data is collected */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population (e.g., 0-14, 15-24, etc.) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population (e.g., Male, Female, Non-binary) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population (e.g., White, African American, Asian, etc.) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the specified demographic group */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status (e.g., Low, Middle, High) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., High School, Bachelor's, Master's, etc.) */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., Employed, Unemployed, Student) */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status (e.g., Single, Married, Divorced) */,
  "health_insurance" TEXT /* Health insurance status (e.g., Insured, Uninsured) */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status (e.g., Fully Vaccinated, Partially Vaccinated, Not Vaccinated) */,
  "mental_health_services_access" TEXT /* Access to mental health services (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
